description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout surrounded by a green hedge. The main structure features a dark gable roof, white exterior walls, and multiple large windows, providing ample natural light. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage, a front porch with columns, and a landscaped yard with palm trees. The rear section contains additional structures, possibly a guest house or utility rooms, connected by paved walkways. The windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The building materials appear to be primarily concrete, glass, and wood, with metal accents on the roof and doors.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, white walls, symmetrical windows, a front porch, and a detached garage, all surrounded by a green hedge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, front porch with columns, driveway, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, side windows, and the green hedge enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detached garage, backyard area, and additional structures at the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entrance, paved walkways, and landscaping details.
